meta.summary: Boltz 2.2.1 structure and affinity prediction runtime with pinned external model-cache helpers, NVIDIA GPU support on amd64, and native arm64 CPU support.
meta.description: Boltz 2.2.1 structure and affinity prediction runtime with pinned external model-cache helpers, NVIDIA GPU support on amd64, and native arm64 CPU support.

test: python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; assert md.version("boltz") == "2.2.1"'

boltz predict --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--accelerator' >/dev/null && boltz predict --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--model' >/dev/null && boltz predict --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--use_msa_server' >/dev/null && boltz predict --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--no_kernels' >/dev/null

python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import torch, numpy, pandas, scipy, numba, gemmi, rdkit, Bio, pytorch_lightning; from rdkit import Chem; from rdkit.Chem.Draw import rdMolDraw2D; drawer = rdMolDraw2D.MolDraw2DSVG(100, 100); drawer.DrawMolecule(Chem.MolFromSmiles("CCO")); drawer.FinishDrawing(); assert "<svg" in drawer.GetDrawingText(); assert md.version("boltz") == "2.2.1"; assert torch.__version__.startswith("2.7.1")'

if [ "$(dpkg --print-architecture)" = amd64 ]; then python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; assert md.version("cuequivariance-torch") == "0.8.0"; assert md.version("cuequivariance-ops-torch-cu12") == "0.8.0"; dist = md.distribution("cuequivariance-ops-cu12"); assert dist.version == "0.8.0"; assert any(str(path).endswith("cuequivariance_ops/lib/libcue_ops.so") for path in dist.files)'; else python -c 'import platform; assert platform.machine().lower() in {"aarch64", "arm64"}'; fi

boltz-download-assets --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download pinned Boltz model and CCD assets' >/dev/null && boltz-download-assets --dry-run 2>&1 | grep -F 'boltz2_conf.ckpt' >/dev/null && boltz-download-assets --list-models 2>&1 | grep -F 'boltz1' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-boltz-assets-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if BOLTZ_CACHE="$tmp" boltz-check-assets --quick >"$tmp/check.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/check.log" >&2; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'Boltz asset cache is incomplete or invalid' "$tmp/check.log" >/dev/null; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

tmp=/tmp/taf-boltz-guard-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if BOLTZ_CACHE="$tmp" boltz predict /opt/boltz/share/testdata/tiny.yaml >"$tmp/predict.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/predict.log" >&2; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'refusing an implicit network download' "$tmp/predict.log" >/dev/null; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

python -c 'from pathlib import Path; from boltz.main import check_inputs; paths = check_inputs(Path("/opt/boltz/share/testdata/tiny.yaml")); assert paths == [Path("/opt/boltz/share/testdata/tiny.yaml")]'

python -c 'import torch; from boltz.model.layers.triangular_mult import TriangleMultiplicationOutgoing; layer = TriangleMultiplicationOutgoing(8); out = layer(torch.zeros(1, 3, 3, 8), torch.ones(1, 3, 3), use_kernels=False); assert out.shape == (1, 3, 3, 8)'

upstream.name: Boltz
upstream.citation: Passaro S, Wohlwend J, Corso G, Vahdat A, Stärk H, Barzilay R, Jaakkola T. Boltz-2: Towards Accurate and Efficient Binding Affinity Prediction. bioRxiv. 2025.
